conversation.text: hey Sarah, saw you filled in the form. just wanted to say hi and see what's going on with your setup at the moment
Hey! Yeah we're just investigating AI at the moment, not ready to buy yet haha
haha no worries at all, everyone's in investigation mode right now. what specifically are you looking to solve? is it the response times or just the admin volume?
Mostly response times after hours. We lose so many leads at night.
